query:
UPDATE stocks SET currentPrice = CASE ticker
  WHEN 'IREN' THEN '55.86'
  WHEN 'CIFR' THEN '17.25'
  WHEN 'VRT' THEN '183.20'
  WHEN 'ALAB' THEN '163.64'
  WHEN 'ANET' THEN '152.76'
  WHEN 'MU' THEN '206.71'
  WHEN 'DELL' THEN '154.23'
  WHEN 'AMD' THEN '234.99'
  WHEN 'EOSE' THEN '14.36'
  WHEN 'NTLA' THEN '25.89'
  WHEN 'SNOW' THEN '252.99'
  WHEN 'APP' THEN '589.70'
  WHEN 'CRWD' THEN '521.98'
  WHEN 'KLAC' THEN '1159.00'
  WHEN 'SOFI' THEN '28.08'
  WHEN 'NET' THEN '217.16'
  WHEN 'VST' THEN '191.37'
  WHEN 'PLTR' THEN '180.48'
  WHEN 'PATH' THEN '15.44'
  WHEN 'ASML' THEN '1036.41'
  WHEN 'REMX' THEN '70.28'
  WHEN 'AXON' THEN '716.39'
  WHEN 'HIMS' THEN '48.49'
  WHEN 'MRVL' THEN '82.77'
  WHEN 'TEM' THEN '87.03'
  WHEN 'CSL' THEN '338.50'
  WHEN 'TRMB' THEN '80.70'
  WHEN 'MDB' THEN '330.01'
  WHEN 'CRWV' THEN '123.34'
  WHEN 'ARM' THEN '166.60'
  WHEN 'SNPS' THEN '456.09'
  WHEN 'NOVOB.DC' THEN '343.35'
  WHEN 'RXRX' THEN '5.73'
  WHEN 'RMD' THEN '265.26'
  WHEN 'MOH' THEN '161.00'
  ELSE currentPrice
END
WHERE ticker IN ('IREN', 'CIFR', 'VRT', 'ALAB', 'ANET', 'MU', 'DELL', 'AMD', 'EOSE', 'NTLA', 'SNOW', 'APP', 'CRWD', 'KLAC', 'SOFI', 'NET', 'VST', 'PLTR', 'PATH', 'ASML', 'REMX', 'AXON', 'HIMS', 'MRVL', 'TEM', 'CSL', 'TRMB', 'MDB', 'CRWV', 'ARM', 'SNPS', 'NOVOB.DC', 'RXRX', 'RMD', 'MOH');
command:

  WHEN 'IREN' THEN '55.86'
  WHEN 'CIFR' THEN '17.25'
  WHEN 'VRT' THEN '183.20'

  WHEN 'VST' THEN '191.37'
